countryOfOrigin.legend: Which country are the animals coming from?
countryOfOrigin.hint: The country the animals were kept in before this consignment.

reasonForImport.legend: Why are the animals being imported?

purposeInInternalMarket.legend: What is the purpose of the internal-market movement?
purposeInInternalMarket.hint: Only shown when the reason for import is Internal market.

transporterType.legend: What kind of transporter is bringing the animals?

commercialTransporter.hint: The approved commercial carrier used for this consignment.

privateTransporter.hint: The private-transporter contact details for this consignment.

meansOfTransport.legend: How are the animals being transported?

transportIdentification.hint: Vehicle registration, vessel name, flight number, or similar.

transportDocumentReference.hint: A CMR, bill of lading, or equivalent document reference.

transitedCountries.legend: Which countries have the animals travelled through?

arrivalDateAtPort.legend: Expected arrival date at the port of entry

portOfEntry.hint: Choose the UK port or airport where the animals will arrive.

animalsCertifiedFor.legend: What are the animals certified for?
animalsCertifiedFor.hint: Options are loaded from the certificate.

containsUnweanedAnimals.legend: Are there any unweaned animals in this consignment?
containsUnweanedAnimals.hint: An unweaned animal is still dependent on its mother for milk.

regionCodeRequirement.legend: Does the country of origin require a region code?
regionCodeRequirement.hint: Some countries require an ISO region code alongside the country code.

regionCode.legend: Enter the region of origin code
regionCode.hint: Up to 5 characters. For example, FR-75.

placeOfOrigin.legend: Where the animals were kept before this consignment
placeOfOrigin.hint: The holding, farm or premises the animals came from.

consignor.hint: The person or organisation dispatching the animals.

consignee.hint: The person or organisation the animals are being sent to.

importer.hint: The trader responsible for the import declaration.

placeOfDestination.legend: Where the animals will be kept after arrival
placeOfDestination.hint: The holding, farm or premises the animals will be delivered to.

contactAddress.hint: Point of contact if we need to reach you about this consignment.

commodityCode.hint: The V4 commodity code for this line.

commodityType.hint: Choose the category that best describes this line.

species.legend: Which species are on this line?

numberOfAnimals.legend: How many animals are on this line?

cph.hint: Required for cattle, pigs, sheep and goats. Max 11 characters.

accompanyingDocumentType.hint: The kind of document that supports this consignment.

accompanyingDocumentAttachmentType.hint: Physical original / physical copy / digital PDF / digital signed.

accompanyingDocumentReference.hint: The reference or ID printed on the document (max 40 characters).

commodity-lines-intro.lead: You need to add at least one commodity line. Each line captures a commodity code, the type, species and count.

phaseBanner.html: EUDPA-249 flow-layer spike — non-functional prototype, not a real service.

hub.heading: Live animals — EUDPA-249 flow-layer prototype
hub.lead: Complete each section. Your progress is saved as you go.

progress.notStarted: You have not started this journey yet.
progress.inProgress: You are part-way through this journey.

cya.heading: Check your answers
cya.bannerHeading: You still need to complete some sections
cya.submitReady: All required obligations are fulfilled. In a real service, this is where the user would submit.

commodityLines.heading: Commodity lines
commodityLines.lead: Add one or more commodity lines. Each line captures a commodity code, species, and count.

enumNotInOptions.plain: Select a value from the list
enumNotInOptions.withInvalid: Select a value from the list (invalid: {invalid})

domain.stringMaxLength: Enter no more than {max} characters (you entered {actual})
domain.integerMin: Enter a whole number of at least {min}
domain.integerMaxDigits: Enter a whole number with no more than {maxDigits} digits
domain.dateFormat: Enter a valid date in DD/MM/YYYY format
domain.arrayMaxSelections: Select no more than {max} items (you selected {actual})
domain.numberOfAnimalsSpeciesCap: Enter no more than {max} animals for the selected species (you entered {actual})
domain.unknownCode: This value could not be validated (error code: {code})
